# 第四部分：深度理解与语言支持 (Understanding & Nuance)

## 1. 术语解析

### **Stable equivalence**

**Stable equivalence** 指在允许添加共同辅助能带或辅助能隙系统后判断两个 Hamiltonian 是否同相。它比“直接绝热连通”更宽松。语境中的关键句是：*"there is a gapped Hamiltonian \(H'\) such that there is a path from \(H_0 \oplus H'\) to \(H_1 \oplus H'\) without closing a gap."*  
微妙点：稳定等价会忽略某些不稳定拓扑差异，因此适合 \(K\)-理论分类，但不等同于所有有限带模型的精细相图分类。

### **Factor system**

**Factor system** 是投影表示中乘法不严格闭合时出现的 \(U(1)\) 相位：
\[
u_g u_h^{\phi_g}=z_{g,h}u_{gh}.
\]
它不是任意“相位修正”，而是决定对称性如何在量子 Hilbert 空间中实现的二上循环。自旋 \(\frac12\)、反幺正操作、超导配对表示都会改变 factor system。

### **Twisted equivariant \(K\)-group**

**Twisted equivariant \(K\)-group** 同时包含三类信息：空间上的群作用 \(G\curvearrowright X\)、反幺正/手征等符号 \(\phi,c\)、以及投影表示扭曲 \(z\)。这里的 “twisted” 不是泛指复杂，而是指 \(K\)-理论系数和对称表示被 factor system 与反线性结构扭曲。

### **\(E_2\) page**

AHSS 中 \(E_2\) page 是由 \(E_1\) page 经第一微分 \(d_1\) 取同调得到的页面。它包含局域胞腔分类在相邻胞腔兼容条件下的结果。微妙点：\(E_2\) page 通常还不是最终 \(K\)-群；高阶微分 \(d_2,d_3\) 和扩张问题仍可能改变最终答案。

### **Setwise fixed vs pointwise fixed**

**Setwise fixed** 表示群元素把胞腔整体映回自身；**pointwise fixed** 表示胞腔内每个点都不动。该研究要求前者推出后者。区别很关键：若一个镜面对称把一条线段整体保持但在线段内部反射点，则 setwise fixed 但非 pointwise fixed；这种情形会使胞腔内部仍有非平凡空间作用，局域 \(K\)-群计算更复杂。

---

## 2. 疑难查证

### **为什么 \(E_2\) page 不等于最终 \(K\)-群？**

AHSS 像一个“分层筛选器”。  
- \(E_1\)：每个 \(p\)-胞腔上可放置哪些局域拓扑块。  
- \(d_1\)：这些局域块在相邻胞腔边界上是否匹配。  
- \(E_2=\ker d_1/\operatorname{im}d_1\)：通过第一层兼容性检验的对象。  
- \(d_2,d_3\)：检查更高阶的全局障碍，例如二维/三维胞腔之间的非局域一致性。  
- \(E_\infty\)：给出 associated graded pieces。  
- extension：把 graded pieces 拼成真正 \(K\)-群。

三维中 \(E_4=E_\infty\)，但 \(E_2\to E_3\to E_4\) 仍可能发生变化。因此只知道 \(E_2\) 一般不能唯一确定 \(K\)-群。

### **为什么动量空间和实空间 AHSS 的交集能强约束 \(K\)-群？**

同一个物理分类在动量空间是 \(K\)-cohomology，在实空间是 \(K\)-homology；二者对自由费米子拓扑晶体相同构。  
但是两种 AHSS 的过滤方式不同：  
- 动量空间 AHSS 按 BZ 中高对称点、线、面组织能带拓扑。  
- 实空间 AHSS 按 Wyckoff 位置、胞腔堆叠、低维拓扑块组织拓扑相。  

两者各自从 \(E_2\) 出发会产生候选 \(K\)-群集合。真实分类必须同时满足两套过滤结构，因此取交集会显著减少候选答案。该策略绕开了“不能系统计算所有高阶微分”的瓶颈。

### **为什么要求固定胞腔的群元素逐点固定胞腔？**

若某个群元素只把胞腔整体映回自身，却在胞腔内部移动点，则胞腔上的 Hamiltonian 不是简单的“内部对称分类”，还需要考虑该群元素对胞腔坐标的非平凡作用。  
逐点固定条件使胞腔内部每一点的 little group 相同，局域分类可归约为有限群的 AZ/\(K\)-理论分类，第一微分可通过胞腔边界限制和表示诱导/限制来算法化。

---

# 第五部分：创新评估与关联 (Synthesis & Novelty)

## 1. 创新性判断

### **Large-scale \(E_2\)-page computation across all 1651 MSGs**

过去数年拓扑量子化学、对称指标、实空间构造、AHSS 分类均已发展，但完整覆盖 **1651 magnetic space groups** 且同时处理 TIs/SCs、spinless/spinful、class D/class C、一维配对表示的大规模 \(E_2\) page 数据并不常见。该研究的创新在于把 AHSS 从概念性分类工具推进为可批量执行的计算框架。

### **Unified treatment of momentum-space and real-space AHSS**

已有工作通常偏向动量空间能带表示/对称指标，或偏向实空间拓扑晶体构造。该研究并行计算两套 AHSS，并利用二者同构性对最终 \(K\)-群施加交集约束。这解决了单一路径下 \(E_2\) 后信息不足的问题。

### **Algorithmic cell decomposition with pointwise stabilizers**

特殊胞腔分解条件“setwise fixed implies pointwise fixed”具有实际算法价值。它避免了胞腔内部非平凡群作用导致的复杂 equivariant \(K\)-理论计算，使 \(d_1\) 可系统实现。该技术把高对称空间的几何复杂性前置到胞腔分解算法中，降低后续代数计算难度。

### **Candidate \(K\)-group enumeration despite unknown higher differentials**

高阶微分 \(d_2,d_3\) 的通用公式缺失是 AHSS 在三维拓扑晶体分类中的核心障碍。该研究不直接求解所有高阶微分，而是枚举所有与 \(E_2\) 兼容的 \(E_3,E_4\) 和扩张结构，再用动量/实空间交集筛选。此策略在理论不完备的情况下仍能确定约 **59%** 三维设置的 \(K\)-群，属于方法论创新。

### **Systematic inclusion of superconducting pairing representations**

超导体分类不仅依赖空间群，还依赖 gap function 的配对表示 \(\xi\)。该研究将所有一维配对表示纳入 factor system，通过 \(\mathcal G_{\mathrm{MSG}}\times\mathbb Z_2^C\) 与 class D/C PHS 统一处理，使超导拓扑分类比单纯正常态能带分类更完整。

### **Field position**

该工作处在**拓扑晶体相分类、Freed–Moore \(K\)-理论、AHSS、磁空间群数据库计算**的交叉位置。相较对称指标方法，它更接近完整稳定 \(K\)-理论分类；相较纯数学 \(K\)-理论框架，它提供了面向 MSG 数据库的可执行计算流程；相较只给 \(E_2\) 的分类表，它进一步尝试恢复候选最终 \(K\)-群并在大量情形下唯一确定。

items.title_en: Electronic properties and formation pathways of the oxygen vacancy defect family in $4H\text{-SiC}$: A first-principles study

poster_elements.研究问题: 4H-SiC 中氧相关近红外发光中心 PL5、PL6、PL7′、PL8′ 的真实微观结构长期不清：它们究竟对应哪一种氧-硅空位复合缺陷 OV(hh/hk/kh/kk)，为何某些构型特别稀少，以及氧注入退火过程中这些量子发光缺陷如何形成。
poster_elements.创新方法: 用第一性原理把“光谱指纹”和“形成动力学”合在一起判定缺陷身份：同时计算零声子线 ZPL、零场分裂 D/E、超精细相互作用，并用大超胞确定四种 OV 构型的能量排序；Aha 点是发现 PL5 不是过去认为的 OV(hk)，而应改指认为 OV(kh)，高 |E| 的 OV(hk) 对应 PL7′，同时揭示 OV(kk) 因 4H-SiC 特有堆垛导致的高势垒跨层迁移瓶颈而难以生成。
poster_elements.工作流程: 输入为 4H-SiC 晶格、氧杂质与硅/碳空位模型；先构建四种不等价 OV 构型 hh、hk、kh、kk，进行 DFT/HSE06 与大超胞 PBEsol 结构弛豫；再计算 ZPL、D/E 零场分裂和 Si/O 位点超精细谱，与实验 PL5–PL8′ 光谱逐项匹配；随后用 CI-NEB 追踪氧间隙、替位氧、硅空位、碳空位的迁移路径和能垒；最终输出四个发光中心的构型归属与形成路径图：移动硅空位被静止替位氧 O_C 捕获形成 OV。
poster_elements.关键结果: 建立统一指认：PL6=OV(hh)，PL5=OV(kh)，PL7′=OV(hk)，PL8′=OV(kk)。计算 ZPL 位于约 1.1–1.2 eV，与实验近红外发光范围一致；PBEsol 给出的相对能量顺序 hh > kh > kk > hk 精确对应实验 PL6 > PL5 > PL8′ > PL7′；修正后的 D 值与实验偏差小于约 50 MHz；OV(hk) 的大横向分裂 |E| 解释 PL7′，排除其作为 PL5 的可能；超精细谱进一步确认 PL6(hh) 与 PL5(kh)。动力学上，O_i 会先无势垒被单空位捕获为稳定替位氧，真正形成 OV 的主通道是 V_Si 迁移到 O_C；OV(kk) 形成受高势垒跨层 hk(2) 路径阻碍，解释其实验产额低。
poster_elements.应用价值: 为 4H-SiC 氧相关量子发光中心提供可操作的“结构—光谱—工艺”地图：实验者可通过氧注入和热退火调控不同 OV 构型的产额，定向增强 PL5、PL6、PL7′ 或尝试生成稀有 PL8′；该研究有助于开发稳定、可集成、近红外自旋量子发射器，用于量子通信、量子传感、片上光子器件和电控自旋缺陷平台。

items.deep_analysis:
## 第一部分：核心概览

该研究以第一性原理系统厘清 **4H-SiC 中氧-硅空位复合缺陷 OV 家族**的光学、磁共振与形成动力学，建立 **PL5、PL6、PL7′、PL8′** 与四种晶体学非等价构型 **OV(kh)、OV(hh)、OV(hk)、OV(kk)** 的统一对应关系。核心修正是将长期争议的 **PL5** 从先前的 **OV(hk)** 重新归属为 **OV(kh)**，并确认 **PL6 = OV(hh)**。通过 **ZPL、ZFS、超精细相互作用、CI-NEB 迁移势垒**的联合证据，氧相关发光中心不再只是静态能级问题，而被解释为由 **静态替位氧俘获迁移硅空位**主导的非平衡生成过程。该工作在 SiC 量子缺陷领域提供了兼具谱学指认和缺陷工程指导意义的统一模型。

---

## 第二部分：结构化快速回顾

《Electronic properties and formation pathways of the oxygen vacancy defect family in \(4H\text{-SiC}\): A first-principles study》（Xin Zhao, Mingzhe Liu, and Chang-Kui Duan，2026）

### 背景

**4H-SiC** 是成熟宽禁带半导体平台，兼具高功率电子学与量子缺陷集成优势。**PL5/PL6** 长期被认为与双空位或堆垛层错相关，但氧注入实验、\({}^{17}\mathrm{O}\) 超精细信号和新增 **PL7′/PL8′** 发光中心表明，这一系列中心应源于 **氧-硅空位复合体 OV**。

### 方法

采用 **VASP 第一性原理计算**，结合 **PBEsol**、**HSE06 混合泛函**、**480 原子与 2160 原子超胞**、**受限 DFT 激发态计算**、**ZFS/超精细张量计算**和 **CI-NEB 反应路径搜索**。HSE06 用于绝对 **ZPL** 和自旋参数，2160 原子 PBEsol 用于相对能量排序和构型层级判断。

### 结果

确认四种 OV 构型与四个实验中心的一一对应关系：  
**PL6 = OV(hh)**，**PL5 = OV(kh)**，**PL8′ = OV(kk)**，**PL7′ = OV(hk)**。  
实验 ZPL 顺序 **PL6 1.195 eV > PL5 1.190 eV > PL8′ 1.151 eV > PL7′ 1.121 eV** 与 PBEsol 构型顺序 **hh 1.056 eV > kh 1.035 eV > kk 1.032 eV > hk 0.968 eV** 完全一致。

### 讨论

**横向 ZFS 参数 \(E\)** 是区分 basal-plane 构型的关键指纹。**OV(hk)** 计算得到大 \(|E|\) 值，对应 **PL7′** 而非 **PL5**；**OV(kh)** 的超精细分布与 PL5 实验谱匹配。动力学上，OV 形成主要来自 **\(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\)** 向静态 **\(\mathrm{O_C}\)** 迁移并被俘获，而不是 \(\mathrm{O_i}+DV\) 或 \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}+\mathrm{V_C}\) 主导。

### 局限

**\(E\)** 参数绝对值仍存在 DFT 与实验偏差；**PL7′/PL8′** 的实验超精细谱尚未获得；势垒分析中忽略了空位 **Jahn-Teller 畸变**；部分构型能量差小于 **0.02 eV**，接近计算不确定度。

### 结论

OV 家族为 PL5–PL8′ 氧相关发光中心提供统一微观起源。谱学指认与动力学路径共同表明，氧注入后高温退火产生的缺陷分布受 **硅空位迁移路径、4H 堆垛序列和特定 interlayer 势垒瓶颈**控制，可用于设计退火策略和定向生成稀有 OV 构型。

---

# 第三部分：逐章节冷凝解析

## I. INTRODUCTION

### **4H-SiC as a mature quantum-defect platform**

**4H-SiC** 同时具备宽禁带功率器件材料属性和量子缺陷平台属性，关键材料优势包括 **优良热导率、大击穿场、化学稳定性**。文中明确指出其电子学基础：*"4H-SiC has become a key wide-band gap semiconductor for high-power and high-temperature electronics, owing to its excellent thermal conductivity, large breakdown field, and chemical stability"*。量子信息意义来自 **可光学寻址自旋态**和**长相干时间**，即 *"point defects in 4H-SiC have recently attracted considerable interest as potential solid-state quantum systems, offering optically addressable spin states and long coherence times"*。

### **Industrial maturity enables device-level quantum integration**

**4H-SiC** 的独特优势不只是单缺陷性能，而是可与成熟光电子器件集成。文中将其描述为 *"industrial maturity"*，并强调这种成熟性 *"facilitates the seamless integration of spin defects with complex photonic and electronic components, such as waveguides and p-i-n diodes"*。这种集成直接服务于 **光提取效率**和**电学操控**优化：*"Such device-level integration is essential for optimizing the optical extraction and electronic manipulation of spin defects"*。

### **PL series as telecom-relevant spin emitters**

**PL1–PL6** 被归入双空位相关或类双空位相关的发光中心系列，核心特性包括 **长自旋相干时间、spin-selective optical transitions、telecom-wavelength fluorescence**。原文表述为 *"the divacancy-related 'PL series' (PL1-PL6) has garnered significant attention due to its unique combination of long spin-coherence times, spin-selective optical transitions, and telecom-wavelength fluorescence"*。这些特征使其成为量子技术候选体系：*"promising candidate systems for a broad spectrum of solid-state quantum technologies"*。

### **PL5 and PL6 combine divacancy-like features with superior practical traits**

**PL5/PL6** 与 **PL1–PL4 双空位家族**相似，具有 **近红外发射、三重态基态、相近 ZFS 参数**。文中指出它们 *"share remarkable similarities with the divacancy family (PL1-4), including near-infrared emission, spin triplet ground states, and comparable zero-field-splitting (ZFS) parameters"*。同时它们具备更优工程属性：**室温相干、抗 PL 激发的电荷稳定性、更高自旋读出对比度**，即 *"room-temperature coherence, enhanced charge stability against photoluminescence excitation, and higher spin-readout contrast"*。

### **Microscopic origin of PL5 and PL6 remained debated for over a decade**

尽管 PL5/PL6 性能优越，其微观结构长期未定。原文给出争议状态：*"the precise microscopic origin of PL5 and PL6 remained a subject of intense debate for over a decade"*。这说明问题不只是能级匹配，而是结构模型、化学成分和生成机制均未闭合。

### **Divacancy-near-stacking-fault model emerged from spectral similarity**

早期模型将 PL5/PL6 归因于 **堆垛层错附近的双空位 DVSF**，逻辑基础是 ZPL 和自旋性质与双空位相似。原文描述为 *"the striking similarity in zero-phonon lines (ZPLs) and spin properties led to the natural hypothesis that they were variants of the divacancy"*，并明确模型为 *"divacancies located near stacking faults (DVSF)"*。

### **DVSF model weakened by lack of correlation with stacking-fault-inducing treatments**

DVSF 模型的实验证据出现断裂。Son 等实验发现 PL5/PL6 形成与诱导堆垛层错的表面处理无关：*"the formation of these centers did not correlate with surface treatments known to induce stacking faults"*。这一点构成对 DVSF 模型的早期反证：*"casting early doubt on the DVSF model"*。

### **Oxygen-vacancy complex became the leading alternative**

随着 DVSF 模型受质疑，**氧-空位复合体 \(\mathrm{O_CV_{Si}}\)** 成为主要候选。文中定义其为 *"the oxygen-vacancy \((\mathrm{O_CV_{Si}})\) complex, or OV center"*。早期理论显示其 **热力学稳定**且电子结构与 PL5/PL6 相容：*"the OV defect is thermodynamically stable and possesses electronic structures compatible with the PL5 and PL6 series"*。

### **Previous theoretical assignments were incomplete and partly contested**

Bai 等基于 **ZPL 和 ZFS \(D\)** 认为 OV 可解释 PL5/PL6：*"suggesting, based on ZPL and ZFS calculations, that the OV center is a plausible microscopic origin for PL5 and PL6"*。后续混合泛函超精细研究支持 **PL6 = OV(hh)**，但 PL5 仍存在不确定性：*"The results supported the assignment of PL6 to the OV(hh) configuration and discussed the possible structure of PL5"*。

### **Recent oxygen implantation and \(^{17}\mathrm{O}\) hyperfine evidence settled oxygen involvement**

近期实验提供关键证据。Chen 等证明 PL5/PL6 与堆垛层错空间解耦，并且氧注入显著提高产额：*"PL5 and PL6 emitters are spatially decoupled from stacking faults"*，*"oxygen implantation significantly enhances the yield of these centers"*。最强证据来自 \({}^{17}\mathrm{O}\) 超精细信号：*"characteristic hyperfine signatures associated with \(^{17}\mathrm{O}\) isotopes have also been detected"*，被称为氧参与的 *"smoking-gun evidence"*。

### **PL7′ and PL8′ expanded the oxygen-related family to four centers**

Hu 等独立实验发现氧注入后 PL5/PL6 产额提高超过一个数量级，并发现 **PL7′/PL8′**：*"reported over an order-of-magnitude increase in the yield of PL5 and PL6 following oxygen implantation"*，以及 *"identified two new emitters, labeled \(\mathrm{PL7^{\prime}}\) and \(\mathrm{PL8^{\prime}}\)"*。这些新中心的生成行为和光学性质类似 PL5/PL6：*"production behaviors and optical properties closely resemble those of PL5 and PL6"*。

### **Four emitters naturally map onto four crystallographically inequivalent OV configurations**

实验上有四个氧相关发光中心，晶体学上有四种非等价 OV 构型，这形成强烈的一一对应暗示。原文表述为 *"these four oxygen-related emitters correspond directly to the four crystallographically inequivalent OV configurations"*。但这种对应仍需理论严格验证：*"a rigorous theoretical verification is indispensable to resolve remaining ambiguities—particularly the contested assignment of PL5 and the precise nature of the new centers"*。

### **Formation kinetics remained unexplored before this study**

即使氧参与已确定，氧如何生成不同 OV 构型仍未明晰。关键空白是 *"the kinetic mechanisms governing how oxygen specifically generates these distinct configurations remain unexplored"*。这不仅是基础科学问题，也影响量子缺陷工程优化：*"essential not only for satisfying fundamental scientific curiosity but also for optimizing these emitters for quantum technology applications"*。

### **Study objective is unified spectroscopic assignment plus kinetic formation mechanism**

研究目标是通过 **ZPL、ZFS、超精细相互作用**联合计算确定微观身份，并通过动力学路径解释形成机制。原文给出核心计划：*"By integrating high-accuracy calculations of ZPLs, ZFS parameters, and hyperfine interactions, we establish a robust unified assignment for the PL5, PL6, PL7', and PL8' centers"*；同时 *"elucidate the kinetic pathways governing their formation"*，解释 **PL8′ 稀缺性**并指导缺陷工程。

---

## II. METHODOLOGY

## A. Calculation setup

### **DFT simulations used VASP with PAW pseudopotentials**

全部第一性原理模拟基于 **VASP**。原文为 *"Our density functional theory (DFT) simulations were carried out using the Vienna ab initio Simulation Package (VASP)"*。芯电子与价电子相互作用采用 **PAW 方法**：*"we utilized the projector augmented wave (PAW) approach along with the recommended standard pseudopotentials"*。

### **PBEsol functional selected for solid-state structural energetics**

交换关联泛函采用 **PBEsol**，理由是其针对固体优化：*"The exchange-correlation interactions were treated with the PBEsol functional, which is specifically optimized for solid-state systems"*。这一选择服务于大超胞中构型相对稳定性和势垒的计算。

### **Plane-wave cutoff and \(k\)-point settings were explicitly specified**

平面波动能截断为 **520 eV**：*"We employed a plane-wave basis set with a kinetic-energy cutoff of \(520\mathrm{eV}\)"*。原胞布里渊区采样采用 **\(12\times 12\times 2\) Monkhorst-Pack \(k\)-point grid**，扩展超胞只取 **\(\Gamma\) 点**：*"a \(12\times 12\times 2\) Monkhorst-Pack \(k\)-point grid was applied to the primitive cell, whereas calculations for the expanded supercell were restricted to the \(\Gamma\) point"*。

### **Electronic and ionic convergence thresholds were stringent**

电子自洽能量收敛阈值为 **\(1\times10^{-6}\) eV**，离子力收敛阈值为 **0.01 eV/Å**。原文为 *"converged when the energy change and interatomic forces fell below \(1\times10^{-6}\mathrm{eV}\) and \(0.01\mathrm{eV}/\AA\) respectively"*。

### **Two large quasicubic supercells were constructed**

缺陷计算采用两个准立方超胞：**480 原子**和 **2160 原子**。基矢分别为 \(\{5a,3a+6b,2c\}\) 与 \(\{9a,5a+10b,3c\}\)。原文写明：*"we constructed two quasicubic supercells defined by the set of basis vectors \(\{5a, 3a + 6b, 2c\}\) (480 atoms) and \(\{9a, 5a + 10b, 3c\}\) (2160 atoms)"*。

### **Random initial displacements and no symmetry constraints helped avoid metastability**

为避免陷入亚稳结构，初始原子坐标加入微小随机扰动：*"we introduced minor stochastic displacements to the initial atomic coordinates"*。弛豫过程中不施加对称性限制：*"no symmetry constraints were imposed"*。因此平衡结构可能偏离理想对称：*"equilibrium structures and their corresponding electronic features may show subtle deviations from idealized symmetry"*。

---

## B. Calculation method

### **Computational targets included ZPL, ZFS, hyperfine tensors, and formation barriers**

方法部分的计算目标包括 **zero-phonon lines、zero-field splitting、hyperfine interactions、formation pathway energy profiles**。原文明确：*"we focus on calculating zero-phonon lines (ZPLs) and spin parameters, including zero-field splitting (ZFS) and hyperfine interactions"*，并补充 *"we determine the energy profiles of the defect formation pathways"*。

---

## 1. Zero-phonon line

### **OV electronic structure was treated as divacancy-like**

OV 中心的电子结构与 **\(\mathrm{V_{Si}V_C}\)** 双空位相似：*"the electronic structure of the OV center closely resembles that of the \(\mathrm{V_{Si}V_C}\) divacancy center (DV)"*。这为用双空位类模型解释 PL5–PL8′ 的三重态光学跃迁提供基础。

### **High-symmetry hh/kk configurations have \(^3A_2\) ground state and \(^3E\) excited state**

对于 **hh 或 kk** 高对称构型，基态和最低激发态分别为 **\(^3\mathrm{A}_2\)** 与 **\(^3\mathrm{E}\)**：*"For the high-symmetry configurations (hh or kk), the ground state and lowest excited state correspond to \(^3\mathrm{A}_2\) and \(^3\mathrm{E}\), respectively"*。

### **Constrained DFT modeled the excited state by minority-spin promotion**

在 **cDFT** 中，\(^3E\) 态通过将一个少数自旋电子从 **\(a_1\)** 轨道提升到 **\(e\)** 单粒子能级并完全弛豫来模拟：*"the \(^3\mathrm{E}\) state is modeled by promoting a minority-spin electron from the \(a_1\) orbital to the \(e\) single-particle level, followed by a full structural relaxation of the excited-state geometry"*。

### **Dual functional strategy separated absolute ZPL accuracy from relative energetic ordering**

研究采用双轨计算方案：**HSE06** 用于标准超胞中的绝对 ZPL，**PBEsol + 2160 原子超胞**用于构型相对能量排序。原文为 *"we implemented a dual calculation scheme"*；具体为 *"The HSE06 hybrid functional was employed in standard supercells to derive the absolute ZPL energies"*，同时 *"the energetic ordering was resolved using the PBEsol functional in expanded 2160-atom supercells"*。

---

## 2. Spin parameters

### **Spin Hamiltonian included ZFS and hyperfine interaction**

无外磁场下电子自旋哈密顿量为  
\[
H_{\text{spin}}=\mathbf{S}\cdot\mathbf{D}\cdot\mathbf{S}+\mathbf{S}\cdot\mathbf{A}\cdot\mathbf{I}.
\]  
原文解释：*"\(\mathbf{S}\) and \(\mathbf{I}\) denote the total electronic and nuclear spin operators"*，\(\mathbf{D}\) 和 \(\mathbf{A}\) 分别是 **ZFS tensor** 与 **hyperfine interaction tensor**。

### **ZFS arises from magnetic dipole-dipole interaction between unpaired electron spins**

ZFS 项来源于未配对电子自旋之间的磁偶极-偶极相互作用：*"The term \(\mathbf{S}\cdot\mathbf{D}\cdot\mathbf{S}\) originates from the magnetic dipole-dipole interaction between unpaired electron spins"*。该作用导致总自旋子能级在零磁场下分裂：*"results in ZFS of the total spin sublevels"*。

### **Hyperfine interaction couples electronic and nuclear spins**

超精细项描述电子自旋与核自旋耦合：*"The term \(\mathbf{S}\cdot\mathbf{A}\cdot\mathbf{I}\) describes the coupling between the electronic and nuclear spins"*，并进一步造成电子自旋子能级的超精细分裂：*"induces further hyperfine splitting of the electronic spin sublevels"*。

### **Calculated spin tensors enable direct ODMR/ESR comparison**

一旦得到 **\(\mathbf{D}\)** 和 **\(\mathbf{A}\)**，可解完整哈密顿量并与实验比较：*"the full Hamiltonian in Eq. (1) can be solved to obtain the electronic spin sublevels, allowing for direct comparison with optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) or electron-spin resonance (ESR) experimental spectra"*。

### **ZFS tensor was calculated from Kohn-Sham orbitals with PAW correction**

ZFS 计算基于周期性 DFT 的 **Kohn-Sham 轨道**：*"The ZFS tensor \(\mathbf{D}\) was calculated using a formalism based on Kohn-Sham orbitals from periodic density functional calculations"*。并采用 VASP 中的 **PAW correction**：*"We employed the projector augmented wave (PAW) correction as implemented in VASP"*。

### **Axial and transverse ZFS parameters were defined from diagonalized tensor**

对角化 \(\mathbf{D}\) 张量并对齐主轴后，定义  
\[
D=\frac{3}{2}D_{zz},\quad E=\frac{1}{2}(D_{xx}-D_{yy}).
\]  
原文说明：*"the axial component \(D\) and the transverse component \(E\) are defined as"* 该式，并指出二者表征自旋子能级分裂：*"These two parameters characterize the splitting of the spin sublevels"*。

### **Spin contamination correction was applied to improve ZFS values**

为获得准确 ZFS，采用 Biktagirov 等提出的自旋污染校正：*"we applied the correction scheme proposed by Biktagirov et al. to account for spin contamination effects"*。这对后续重新比较 **\(D\)** 参数非常关键。

### **Hyperfine tensor included Fermi contact and dipolar components**

超精细张量由两部分组成：**isotropic Fermi contact term** 和 **anisotropic dipolar component**。原文为 *"The hyperfine interaction tensor \(\mathbf{A}\) is composed of two primary contributions: the isotropic Fermi contact term \(\mathbf{A}_{\mathrm{iso}}\) and the anisotropic dipolar component \(\mathbf{A}_{\mathrm{ani}}\)"*。

### **Hyperfine calculations used HSE06 but excluded core-electron contributions**

所有超精细张量分量使用 **HSE06** 评估：*"All components of the hyperfine tensors were evaluated using the HSE06 hybrid functional to ensure higher accuracy"*。同时排除芯电子贡献：*"the contributions originating from core electrons were excluded from the calculations"*。

---

## 3. Formation pathway and energy barriers

### **CI-NEB was used for reaction barriers**

形成路径与能垒通过 **climbing image nudged elastic band, CI-NEB** 计算：*"the reaction energy barriers of key elementary steps were calculated using the climbing image nudged elastic band (CI-NEB) method"*。采用改进切线定义：*"incorporating the improved tangent definition"*。

### **Formation-path calculations used VASP with VTST**

路径计算使用 **VASP + VTST** 工具：*"The calculations were carried out using VASP interfaced with the VASP Transition State Tools (VTST) tools"*。布里渊区采样使用单一 \(\Gamma\) 点：*"employing a single \(\Gamma\) point for Brillouin-zone sampling"*。

### **Five intermediate images and force convergence of 0.01 eV/Å were used**

每条路径插入 **5 个中间 image**：*"In all pathways, five intermediate images were used to interpolate between the initial and final structures"*。所有 images 的力收敛标准为 **0.01 eV/Å**：*"A force convergence criterion of \(0.01\mathrm{eV}/\AA\) was applied to all images along the reaction pathway"*。

---

# III. RESULTS AND DISCUSSION

## A. Static properties and re-assignment

### **Prior PL5 assignment to OV(hk) was undermined by the transverse \(E\) parameter**

此前 PL5 被归为 **OV(hk)**，但该构型具有过大的 **\(E\)** 值。文中指出：*"the OV(hk) configuration exhibits a substantially large \(E\) value"*，且这种偏差即使考虑计算误差仍显著：*"This significant deviation from experimental data persists even when accounting for potential computational errors"*。此前研究忽略该关键参数：*"this crucial parameter was overlooked in prior assignments"*。

### **\(E\) is necessary for robust identification of basal-plane centers**

对于 basal-plane 缺陷中心，**\(E\)** 不是附属量，而是构型判别必需参数。原文强调其 *"necessity for the robust identification of basal plane centers"*。因此仅用 ZPL 和 \(D\) 会导致 hk/kh 混淆。

### **Recent hyperfine evidence also contradicts PL5 = OV(hk)**

近期实验-理论联合分析显示 **OV(hk)** 的超精细谱与 PL5 不兼容：*"the hyperfine spectrum of the OV(hk) configuration is incompatible with the specific signatures observed for PL5"*。这从微观自旋密度层面进一步否定旧归属。

### **Discovery of PL7′ and PL8′ forces a family-level reassignment**

氧注入发现两个新增中心，使总数达到四个：*"The recent discovery of two additional centers via oxygen ion implantation, alongside the established PL5 and PL6 lines, brings the total count of distinct emitters to four"*。新中心与 PL5/PL6 的光学和生成行为类似：*"optical signatures and production behaviors highly analogous to those of PL5 and PL6"*。这要求四个中心整体重排，而不是单独修补 PL5。

### **Experimental quartet mirrors four crystallographically inequivalent OV configurations**

四个实验中心与四种 OV 构型数量完全对应。原文指出：*"the experimental quartet exactly mirrors the four crystallographically inequivalent OV configurations"*。这使统一重指认成为必要：*"necessitates a unified re-assignment of the entire defect family"*。

### **HSE06 and large-supercell PBEsol were assigned distinct evidentiary roles**

Davidsson 等基准研究表明 HSE06 更适合绝对 ZPL，而大超胞标准泛函更适合相对排序：*"the HSE06 functional yields absolute ZPL energies closer to experimental values, large-scale supercells and standard functionals like PBE are often more reliable for capturing the correct energetic ordering"*。因此本研究采用 HSE06 验证绝对能标，PBEsol 确定排序：*"we utilize the HSE06 results to validate the absolute energy scale and the large-scale PBEsol calculations to determine the precise energetic ordering"*。

### **HSE06 ZPL values reproduce the experimental 1.1–1.2 eV range**

HSE06 得到四个 OV 构型 ZPL 均在 **1.1–1.2 eV**，与实验一致。原文为 *"the ZPL values calculated using the HSE06 functional fall within the 1.1 to \(1.2\mathrm{eV}\) range, which is in excellent quantitative agreement with the experimental range"*。这支持 OV 家族作为这些中心的共同起源：*"provides strong initial evidence that the OV defect family is indeed the origin of these centers"*。

### **Experimental and calculated ZPL orderings match exactly**

实验 ZPL 降序为：  
**PL6 1.195 eV > PL5 1.190 eV > PL8′ 1.151 eV > PL7′ 1.121 eV**。  
原文给出：*"the experimental ZPL energies follow the descending sequence: \(\mathrm{PL6(1.195eV) > PL5(1.190eV) > PL8'(1.151eV)} > \mathrm{PL7}'(1.121\mathrm{eV})\)"*。

PBEsol 计算排序为：  
**hh 1.056 eV > kh 1.035 eV > kk 1.032 eV > hk 0.968 eV**。  
原文为 *"PBEsol calculations ... yield the sequence: \(\mathrm{hh}(1.056\mathrm{eV}) > \mathrm{kh}(1.035\mathrm{eV}) > \mathrm{kk}(1.032\mathrm{eV}) > \mathrm{hk}(0.968\mathrm{eV})\)"*。

这直接给出对应：**PL6(hh)、PL5(kh)、PL8′(kk)、PL7′(hk)**。

### **Table I provides quantitative ZPL and ZFS comparison**

表 I 中四个中心关键数值如下：

- **PL6(hh)**：实验 \(D=1.365\) GHz，计算 \(D=1.413\) GHz；实验 \(E=0.0\) MHz，计算 \(E=-7.2\) MHz；实验 ZPL **1.195 eV**，HSE06/PBEsol ZPL **1.235 / 1.056 eV**。
- **PL7′(hk)**：实验 \(D=1.249\) GHz，计算 \(D=1.215\) GHz；实验 \(E=98.8\) MHz，计算 \(E=-96.9\) MHz；实验 ZPL **1.121 eV**，HSE06/PBEsol **1.114 / 0.968 eV**。
- **PL5(kh)**：实验 \(D=1.372\) GHz，计算 \(D=1.322\) GHz；实验 \(E=15.6\) MHz，计算 \(E=-47.6\) MHz；实验 ZPL **1.190 eV**，HSE06/PBEsol **1.179 / 1.035 eV**。
- **PL8′(kk)**：实验 \(D=1.331\) GHz，计算 \(D=1.361\) GHz；实验 \(E=0.0\) MHz，计算 \(E=2.6\) MHz；实验 ZPL **1.151 eV**，HSE06/PBEsol **1.178 / 1.032 eV**。

表注强调两类泛函职责：*"HSE06 results validate the absolute zero-phonon line (ZPL) energy values ... while the large-scale PBEsol calculations are used to determine the relative energetic ordering"*。

### **Refined \(D\) values agree with experiment within 50 MHz**

引入自旋污染校正与 PAW 贡献后，计算 \(D\) 与实验偏差缩小到 **50 MHz 以内**。原文为 *"our calculated \(D\) values exhibit excellent quantitative agreement with experimental data, with deviations narrowed to within 50 MHz"*。这显著提高了 ZFS 证据的可信度。

### **Systematic \(D\) deviation differs between c-axis and basal configurations**

计算中存在系统趋势：**c 轴构型 hh/kk 的 \(D\)** 略高于实验，而 **basal 构型 hk/kh 的 \(D\)** 略低于实验。原文为 *"the calculated \(D\) values for \(c\)-axis configurations (hh, kk) are slightly larger than the experimental counterparts, whereas those for basal configurations (hk, kh) are slightly smaller"*。该偏差归因于两组缺陷不同的有限尺寸标度行为：*"distinct finite-size scaling behaviors of the two subgroups"*。

### **Intragroup \(D\) ordering remains consistent with experiment**

尽管存在组间系统偏移，组内排序仍正确：*"the intragroup ordering remains fully consistent"*，即 **hh-kk pair** 和 **hk-kh pair** 内部相对大小与实验一致。这支持构型归属，而非削弱它。

### **Transverse \(E\) is decisive for distinguishing PL7′ from PL5**

**PL7′** 实验上 \(|E|=98.8\) MHz，显著大于 **PL5** 的 \(|E|=15.6\) MHz；计算中 **OV(hk)** 的 \(|E|=96.9\) MHz，也显著大于 **OV(kh)** 的 \(|E|=47.6\) MHz。原文总结为 *"Experimentally, the newly discovered PL7' center exhibits a significantly larger \(|E|\) compared with PL5"*，并指出 *"the OV(hk) configuration possesses a much larger \(|E|\) than OV(kh)"*。

### **OV(hk) is electronically analogous to DV(kh), explaining its large \(E\)**

OV(hk) 的自旋承载硅空位位于 cubic k 位点，与 **DV(kh)** 类似。原文为 *"the OV(hk) configuration, which hosts the spin-carrying silicon vacancy \((\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{Si}})\) on the cubic (k) site, is electronically analogous to the DV(kh) center"*。两者具有 k 位点硅空位相关的大横向分裂：*"Both OV(hk) and DV(kh) exhibit the characteristically large splitting associated with the k-site Si vacancy"*。

### **Absolute \(E\) discrepancy remains an open theoretical challenge**

尽管 \(|E|\) 相对层级足以支持归属，绝对值仍存在偏差。原文承认：*"the quantitative discrepancy in absolute \(E\) values remains an open challenge"*，并呼吁未来用更高阶电子结构理论验证：*"calling for future verification using higher-level electronic structure theories"*。

### **PL7′ is assigned to OV(hk), ruling out PL5 = OV(hk)**

基于大 \(|E|\) 指纹，**PL7′ = OV(hk)**。原文明确：*"we assign the high-\(|E|\) PL7' center to the OV(hk) configuration"*。这直接排除旧模型：*"This result definitively rules out the previous attribution of PL5 to OV(hk)"*，并支持 **PL5 = OV(kh)**：*"supports our assignment of PL5 to OV(kh)"*。

### **Hyperfine interaction is treated as the ultimate microscopic fingerprint**

超精细相互作用被视为缺陷结构最强指纹。原文为 *"The most definitive evidence for our assignment arises from the hyperfine interaction, which serves as the ultimate microscopic fingerprint for defect identification"*。这是因为超精细谱直接反映核位点附近自旋密度分布。

### **PL6 = OV(hh) is confirmed by relative hyperfine shifts**

对于 **PL6**，OV(hh) 计算超精细信号准确复现实验中相对于 PL1/PL2 的偏移。原文为 *"the calculated hyperfine signatures of the OV(hh) configuration faithfully reproduce the characteristic shifts observed relative to the divacancy signals (PL1 and PL2)"*。

表 II 中：
- 相对 **PL2[DV(kk)]**：\(\mathrm{Si}_{IIa}\) 计算 **−0.6 MHz**、实验 **−0.7 MHz**；\(\mathrm{Si}_{IIb}\) 计算 **−0.4 MHz**、实验 **−0.4 MHz**。
- 相对 **PL1[DV(hh)]**：\(\mathrm{Si}_{IIa}\) 计算 **+0.2 MHz**、实验 **+0.2 MHz**；\(\mathrm{Si}_{IIb}\) 计算 **+0.5 MHz**、实验 **+0.4 MHz**。

原文评价为 *"excellent agreement with the experimental data"*。

### **PL5 = OV(kh) is supported by hyperfine distribution shape**

PL5 的超精细分布与 **OV(kh)** 的计算谱形高度匹配。原文为 *"the calculated hyperfine spectral shape of the OV(kh) configuration yields an exceptional match with the experimental hyperfine distribution of PL5"*。这种匹配反映 kh 位点特定自旋密度：*"reflecting the specific spin-density landscape of the kh site"*。

### **OV(hk) hyperfine distribution is incompatible with PL5**

相反，**OV(hk)** 谱分布与 PL5 明显不符：*"the OV(hk) configuration exhibits a spectral distribution that severely deviates from the experimental observations"*，包括不兼容的分裂模式和对称性：*"showing incompatible splitting patterns and symmetry"*。因此仅凭超精细信号即可排除旧归属：*"refute the previous assignment of PL5 to OV(hk) ... based on hyperfine signatures alone"*。

### **PL8′ = OV(kk) has concrete hyperfine predictions**

对尚无实验超精细谱的 **PL8′**，模型给出 **OV(kk)** 的可检验预测：
- \(\mathrm{Si}_{IIa}\)：相对 DV(kk) **+0.4 MHz**，相对 DV(hh) **+1.3 MHz**；
- \(\mathrm{Si}_{IIb}\)：相对 DV(kk) **+0.5 MHz**，相对 DV(hh) **+1.3 MHz**。

原文为 *"for the \(\mathrm{Si}_{\mathrm{IIa}}\) sites, the shifts are \(+0.4\mathrm{MHz}\) relative to DV(kk) and \(+1.3\mathrm{MHz}\) relative to DV(hh), while for the \(\mathrm{Si}_{\mathrm{IIb}}\) sites, the predicted shifts are \(+0.5\mathrm{MHz}\) and \(+1.3\mathrm{MHz}\), respectively"*。

### **PL7′ = OV(hk) can be future-verified by its characteristic hyperfine profile**

对 **PL7′**，未来可用 Ref. [22] 中计算的 **OV(hk)** 超精细分布验证。原文指出：*"the assignment of PL7' to the OV(hk) configuration can be verified in the future by comparing experimental spectra with the characteristic hyperfine distribution profiles"*。这些曾用于排除 PL5 的 hk 特征，现在成为 PL7′ 的指纹：*"now serve as a specific fingerprint for the PL7' center"*。

### **\(^{17}\mathrm{O}\) hyperfine parameters offer isotopic verification roadmap**

补充材料提供整个 OV 家族的 \({}^{17}\mathrm{O}\) 超精细参数，用于同位素验证。原文为 *"we provide the calculated \(^{17}\mathrm{O}\) hyperfine parameters for the entire OV family in the Supplemental Material"*，其作用是 *"a definitive roadmap for confirming the oxygen-related nature of these emitters"*。

### **OV charge transition levels explain enhanced charge stability without stacking faults**

PL5/PL6 比 PL1–PL4 电荷更稳定。DVSF 模型需要假设堆垛层错使导带底降低 **0.24 eV**：*"the DVSF model invoked a \(0.24\mathrm{eV}\) reduction in the conduction band minimum (CBM)"*。OV 模型中，\(\varepsilon(0/1-)\) 电荷转变能级天然比 DV 家族更接近 CBM **0.1–0.2 eV**：*"the \(\varepsilon(0/1-)\) charge transition levels of the OV configurations are inherently 0.1 to \(0.2\mathrm{eV}\) closer to the CBM than those of the DV family"*。因此无需堆垛层错即可解释电荷动力学：*"without requiring the presence of structural stacking faults"*。

### **Unified assignment resolves the long-standing microscopic-origin debate**

综合 ZPL、ZFS、超精细、能级排序和电荷稳定性，四个中心统一归属为：
- **PL6(hh)**
- **PL5(kh)**
- **PL8′(kk)**
- **PL7′(hk)**

原文总结为 *"assigning PL6(hh), PL5(kh), PL8'(kk), and PL7'(hk)"*，并指出这 *"resolve the long-standing debate regarding the microscopic origin of these centers"*。

---

## B. The formation pathway

### **Four OV configurations are effectively degenerate within computational uncertainty**

在确认静态归属后，四种 OV 构型能量差小于 **0.02 eV**，落入计算不确定度范围。原文为 *"the four crystallographically inequivalent configurations of the OV complex—which we find to be effectively degenerate as their energy differences \((<0.02\mathrm{eV})\) fall within the limits of computational uncertainty"*。因此实验丰度差异不能仅靠热力学平衡解释，必须考虑动力学。

### **Experimental generation is a nonequilibrium annealing process**

PL5–PL8′ 通常由氧离子注入后高温退火获得，属于非平衡缺陷动力学过程。原文为 *"their experimental realization—typically achieved via oxygen ion implantation followed by high-temperature annealing—constitutes a complex nonequilibrium process governed by defect kinetics"*。

### **Formation-path knowledge directly informs annealing optimization**

形成路径和势垒不仅用于验证 OV 模型，也用于实验调控。原文指出相关知识 *"provides a theoretical foundation for optimizing experimental annealing protocols"*，目标是 *"site-selective enhancement of defect yields for quantum applications"*。

### **Oxygen implantation creates both vacancies and oxygen impurities**

氧注入产生两个主要后果：**生成空位，尤其是硅空位 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\)**；并将氧引入晶格。原文为 *"Oxygen implantation into \(4H\)-SiC induces two primary effects: the generation of vacancies, particularly silicon vacancies \((\mathrm{V_{Si}})\), and the incorporation of oxygen atoms into the host lattice"*。

### **Oxygen can initially occupy substitutional or interstitial sites**

注入后的氧可位于替位位点或间隙位点：*"oxygen atoms may occupy either substitutional sites (forming \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) or \(\mathrm{O_C}\)) or interstitial sites \((\mathrm{O_i})\)"*。退火促使这些缺陷迁移并复合：*"Subsequent annealing promotes defect migration and the formation of defect complexes"*。

### **Substitutional oxygen is immobile; mobile species are \(\mathrm{O_i}\), \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\), and \(\mathrm{V_C}\)**

\(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) 和 \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 在相关温度下迁移势垒高、基本不动。原文为 *"the substitutional \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) and \(\mathrm{O_C}\) defects are immobile at relevant temperatures due to their high migration barriers"*。因此 OV 形成依赖可迁移物种：*"mobile species, specifically \(\mathrm{O_i}\), \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\), and \(\mathrm{V_C}\)"*。

### **Three-body aggregation is statistically negligible**

理论上 \(\mathrm{O_i}\)、\(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\)、\(\mathrm{V_C}\) 三个前驱体可同步聚集形成复合缺陷，但该机制统计上可忽略。原文为 *"the synchronous aggregation of three precursors could theoretically form the composite defect, such a mechanism is statistically negligible"*。实际过程更可能是逐步俘获：*"the defect typically evolves through successive accretion steps"*。

### **Three pairwise channels were considered**

可能的成核路径包括：
1. \(\mathrm{O_i}\) 与已有双空位 **DV** 结合；
2. \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) 与 \(\mathrm{V_C}\) 耦合；
3. \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 与 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 相互作用。

原文为 *"three potential channels: the association of an \(\mathrm{O}_i\) with a pre-existing divacancy (DV), the coupling of \(\mathrm{O}_{\mathrm{Si}}\) with \(\mathrm{V_C}\), or the interaction between \(\mathrm{O_C}\) and \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\)"*。

### **\(\mathrm{O_i}+DV\) pathway is ruled out by kinetic trapping at single vacancies**

\(\mathrm{O_i}\) 迁移快，尚未遇到 DV 就会被单空位俘获。原文直接结论为 *"We first rule out the \(\mathrm{O}_i + \mathrm{DV}\) pathway by demonstrating that mobile oxygen interstitials are overwhelmingly captured by single vacancies before encountering divacancies"*。

### **Oxygen interstitial migration barrier is about 1 eV**

计算得到 \(\mathrm{O_i}\) 迁移势垒约 **1 eV**：*"Our calculated migration barrier for \(\mathrm{O}_i\) is approximately \(1\mathrm{eV}\)"*。宿主空位迁移势垒通常超过 **3.0 eV**：*"host vacancies, which typically exhibit migration barriers exceeding \(3.0\mathrm{eV}\)"*。这意味着退火初期氧间隙已活跃，而空位子晶格仍近似冻结。

### **Initial annealing produces static substitutional oxygen by vacancy capture**

退火早期，\(\mathrm{O_i}\) 被预存单空位 \(\mathrm{V_C}\)、\(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 捕获，形成 \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\)、\(\mathrm{O_C}\)。原文为 *"mobile \(\mathrm{O_i}\) atoms are preferentially intercepted and trapped by the abundant pre-existing single vacancies \(\mathrm{V_C}\) and \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\), leading to the formation of substitutional \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) and \(\mathrm{O_C}\) defects"*。

### **Substitutional oxygen binding energies strongly favor trapping**

\(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) 与 \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 相对于孤立间隙氧和空位更稳定，结合能分别为 **2.9 eV** 与 **6.5 eV**。原文给出：*"calculated binding energies of \(2.9\mathrm{eV}\) for \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) and \(6.5\mathrm{eV}\) for \(\mathrm{O_C}\)"*。尤其 \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 稳定性极高。

### **Barrierless relaxation confirms single-vacancy capture of \(\mathrm{O_i}\)**

计算显示，将 \(\mathrm{O_i}\) 放在 \(\mathrm{V_C}\) 或 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 附近，会无额外能垒地弛豫进空位。原文为 *"when an \(\mathrm{O_i}\) atom is placed in the vicinity of either \(\mathrm{V_C}\) or \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\), it spontaneously relaxes into the vacant site without encountering any additional energy barrier"*。

### **Remaining viable channels are vacancy-mediated**

排除 \(\mathrm{O_i}+DV\) 后，剩余路径依赖宿主空位迁移。原文为 *"the remaining viable formation channels reduce to vacancy-mediated interactions involving \(\mathrm{O_C}\) or \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\)"*。由于替位氧不动，后续 OV 形成只能由 \(\mathrm{V_C}\) 或 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 迁移完成：*"restricted to the migration of host vacancies"*。

### **Two vacancy-mediated mechanisms remain possible**

一条路径是 \(\mathrm{V_C}\) 向 \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) 迁移，然后重构为更稳定的 \(\mathrm{O_CV_{Si}}\)：*"migration of \(\mathrm{V_C}\) toward an \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\) site, followed by a structural reconfiguration into the more stable \(\mathrm{O_CV_{Si}}\) complex"*。另一条是 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 直接被已有 \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 捕获：*"migration of \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) can lead to its direct capture by a pre-existing \(\mathrm{O_C}\) defect"*。

### **Fermi-level pinning determines relevant charge states**

高纯半绝缘样品中残余 N 杂质使 \(E_F\) 倾向 CBM，但 \(\mathrm{V_C}\) 低形成能将 \(E_F\) 钉扎在 \(\varepsilon(0/2+)\)，约位于 VBM 上方 **2.0 eV**。原文为 *"\(E_{\mathrm{F}}\) is effectively pinned at the charge transition level \(\varepsilon (0 / 2+)\), located approximately \(2.0\mathrm{eV}\) above the valence-band minimum (VBM)"*。

### **Relevant vacancy charge states are \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\) and \(\mathrm{V_C}^{0}\)**

在该费米能级条件下，热力学平衡偏好 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) 为 **−1 或 −2**，\(\mathrm{V_C}\) 为 **0 或 +2**：*"thermodynamic equilibrium favors \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) in \(-1\) or \(-2\) states and \(\mathrm{V_C}\) in \(0\) or \(+2\) states"*。由于空位迁移势垒随电荷更负而降低，研究选用最低势垒相关状态：*"the charge states of migrating \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\) and \(\mathrm{V_C}\) are modeled as \(-2\) and \(0\), respectively"*。

### **\(\mathrm{O_C}\) is positive while OV complex is neutral**

在相关费米能级区间，\(\mathrm{O_C}\) 为 **+1 或 +2**，而形成后的 OV 复合体稳定为中性。原文为 *"the \(\mathrm{O_C}\) defect exhibits a positive charge state \((+1\) or \(+2)\), while the resulting OV complex stabilizes in the neutral charge state"*。

### **Jahn-Teller distortion was neglected for migration calculations**

迁移几何中忽略空位 **Jahn-Teller 畸变**。理由是其对路径和势垒影响预期很小：*"a simplification motivated by the expectation that JT effects have a negligible impact on the migration pathways and barrier energies considered in this study"*。类似计算中也采用该近似：*"adopted in similar computational investigations"*。

### **4H-SiC has h and k sites, generating four migration path types**

**4H-SiC** 有两种晶体学非等价格点：**hexagonal h** 与 **cubic k**。原文为 *"The \(4H\)-SiC polytype features two crystallographically inequivalent lattice sites, denoted as hexagonal (h) and cubic (k)"*。不考虑 JT 时，孤立空位保持 **\(C_{3v}\)** 对称：*"an isolated vacancy retains \(\mathrm{C}_{3v}\) point-group symmetry"*。

迁移路径可分为 **同层 intralayer** 与 **沿 c 轴 interlayer**。四类具体路径为：
- hh intralayer
- kk intralayer
- hk(1) interlayer
- hk(2) interlayer

原文说明：*"migration paths can be categorized based on whether the jump occurs within the same basal plane (intralayer) or along the \(c\) axis between adjacent planes (interlayer)"*，并指出 interlayer 因 4H 堆垛分裂为两类：*"interlayer migration is split into two inequivalent trajectories, labeled as \(\mathrm{hk}(1)\) and \(\mathrm{hk}(2)\)"*。

### **NEB barriers were computed for \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\) and \(\mathrm{V_C}^{0}\)**

研究随后计算 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\) 和 \(\mathrm{V_C}^{0}\) 的 NEB 迁移势垒，以确定主导迁移物种。原文为 *"we then compute the NEB migration barriers for \(\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{Si}}^{2-}\) and \(\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{C}}^{0}\) to identify the dominant mobile species"*。

### **\(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\) barriers cluster near 2.5 eV, comparable to 3C-SiC**

对于 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\)，多数路径势垒约 **2.5 eV**，接近 3C-SiC 中报道的 **2.77 eV**。原文为 *"For \(\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{Si}}^{2-}\), the energy barriers generally cluster around \(2.5\mathrm{eV}\), which aligns well with the \(2.77\mathrm{eV}\) migration barrier reported for \(3C\)-SiC"*。

### **hk(2) path is a notable exception with a significantly higher barrier**

在 \(\mathrm{V_{Si}}^{2-}\) 迁移中，\(\mathrm{hk}(2)\) 路径是显著例外。所给文本在此处截断，但已明确写出 *"a notable exception is observed for the \(\mathrm{hk}(2)\) path, which exhibits a significan..."*。结合摘要中完整陈述，**OV(kk)** 形成受 **4H-SiC 堆垛序列导致的高势垒 interlayer migration path** 阻碍：*"the formation of the OV(kk) configuration is significantly hindered by a high-barrier interlayer migration path inherent to the unique stacking sequence of \(4H\)-SiC"*。这解释了 **OV(kk)/PL8′** 的实验稀缺性：*"This kinetic bottleneck provides a natural explanation for the experimental scarcity of this specific configuration"*。

---

# 第四部分：深度理解与语言支持

## 1. 术语解析

### **Zero-phonon line (ZPL)**

**ZPL** 指缺陷在电子态之间跃迁时不伴随声子吸收或发射的纯电子跃迁能量。它不是整个发光谱峰宽或声子边带，而是最能反映缺陷电子能级差的标志量。文中用 ZPL 的绝对值和排序进行构型归属，例如实验顺序 **PL6 > PL5 > PL8′ > PL7′** 与计算构型顺序 **hh > kh > kk > hk** 对应。

### **Zero-field splitting (ZFS)**

**ZFS** 指无外磁场时，自旋三重态因自旋-自旋偶极相互作用而发生能级分裂。文中 ZFS 用两个参数描述：**轴向 \(D\)** 和 **横向 \(E\)**。\(D\) 常用于判断总体自旋密度尺度，\(E\) 对低对称性和 basal-plane 构型尤其敏感。

### **Transverse parameter \(E\)**

**\(E\)** 是 ZFS 张量在垂直主轴方向的不对称分裂参数。其微妙之处在于：绝对值可能受 DFT 误差影响，但 **\(|E|\) 的相对大小**常能可靠区分 hk 与 kh。文中正是利用 **PL7′ 大 \(|E|\)** 与 **OV(hk) 大 \(|E|\)** 的对应，推翻 PL5 = OV(hk)。

### **Hyperfine interaction**

**超精细相互作用**描述电子自旋与核自旋耦合。它比 ZPL 更“局域”，能反映自旋密度在具体原子核附近的分布，因此是微观结构指纹。文中 PL6 的 \(\mathrm{Si}_{IIa}\)、\(\mathrm{Si}_{IIb}\) 相对频移达到 **0.1 MHz 级别的一致性**，构成强证据。

### **Kinetic bottleneck**

**动力学瓶颈**不是指最终结构热力学不稳定，而是通往该结构的路径需要跨越高势垒，导致实际生成率低。文中 OV(kk) 与其他构型能量近似简并，但生成路径中存在高势垒 interlayer migration，因此 PL8′ 稀少。

---

## 2. 疑难查证

### **为什么能量近似简并仍会出现丰度差异？**

若四种 OV 构型能量差 **<0.02 eV**，热平衡下它们应接近等概率。然而实验生成不是充分热平衡过程，而是氧注入后退火产生的非平衡反应网络。缺陷最终分布由“能不能到达”而非只由“到达后多稳定”决定。若某构型需要经过高势垒 \(\mathrm{hk}(2)\) interlayer 跳跃，即使最终能量低，也会因反应速率低而稀少。

### **为什么 \(\mathrm{O_i}+DV\) 路径被排除？**

\(\mathrm{O_i}\) 势垒约 **1 eV**，先动起来；宿主空位势垒通常 **>3 eV**，早期基本不动。DV 需要单空位迁移和聚集才能形成，在早期浓度低。移动的 \(\mathrm{O_i}\) 更可能先遇到大量单空位，并无势垒地变成 \(\mathrm{O_C}\) 或 \(\mathrm{O_{Si}}\)。因此 \(\mathrm{O_i}\) 不是主要去找 DV，而是先被单空位“截获”。

### **为什么 PL5 不能只靠 ZPL 和 \(D\) 归属？**

ZPL 和 \(D\) 对 hk/kh 的区分能力有限，尤其在计算误差、有限尺寸效应和构型能量接近时容易产生错误对应。**\(E\)** 和超精细分布更敏感于局部对称性和自旋密度位置。PL5 的实验 \(|E|=15.6\) MHz，而 PL7′ 的 \(|E|=98.8\) MHz；OV(hk) 计算 \(|E|=96.9\) MHz，明显对应 PL7′ 而不是 PL5。超精细谱也显示 OV(kh) 才匹配 PL5。

---

# 第五部分：创新评估与关联

## 1. 创新性判断

### **从单中心归属转向完整 OV 家族统一映射**

过去 2–5 年内，相关研究已逐步确认氧参与 PL5/PL6，并提出 OV 假说，但多集中于 PL5/PL6 的局部归属。该研究的主要新意在于把 **PL5、PL6、PL7′、PL8′** 作为一个完整四元家族处理，利用四个实验中心与四个非等价 OV 构型的一一对应关系，建立统一映射：  
**PL6 = OV(hh)**，**PL5 = OV(kh)**，**PL8′ = OV(kk)**，**PL7′ = OV(hk)**。

### **纠正 PL5 的关键误归属**

先前 PL5 常被归为 **OV(hk)**，主要基于 ZPL 与 \(D\)。该研究指出旧模型忽略 **横向 ZFS 参数 \(E\)**，并引入超精细分布作为决定性证据，将 PL5 重新归为 **OV(kh)**。这不是简单数值微调，而是改变了 PL5 的微观构型身份。

### **将新增 PL7′/PL8′ 纳入理论框架**

氧注入实验新发现 **PL7′/PL8′** 后，需要解释它们与 PL5/PL6 的关系。该研究给出 **PL7′ = OV(hk)**、**PL8′ = OV(kk)**，并为二者预测超精细特征，尤其提供 PL8′ 相对 DV 的 MHz 级 \(\mathrm{Si}_{II}\) 位点频移。这为未来 ODMR/ESR 或同位素实验提供直接检验目标。

### **从静态谱学识别推进到形成动力学解释**

前人主要解决“是什么缺陷”，较少回答“为什么某些构型多、某些少”。该研究通过 **CI-NEB 迁移路径**分析，指出 OV 形成由 **静态 \(\mathrm{O_C}\)** 俘获移动 **\(\mathrm{V_{Si}}\)** 主导，而不是 \(\mathrm{O_i}+DV\) 主导。进一步提出 **OV(kk)** 的生成受 4H 堆垛导致的高势垒 interlayer 迁移路径限制，从动力学上解释 **PL8′ 稀缺**。

### **提供面向缺陷工程的退火策略逻辑**

由于各构型热力学近似简并，实验可通过调控退火温度、时间和空位迁移阶段改变构型产额。该研究把 **形成势垒、迁移物种、费米能级钉扎、电荷态选择**连接起来，使 OV 家族不再只是被动识别对象，而成为可工程化生成的量子发光缺陷体系。
